goal: New employee onboarding workflow
description: Automate the process of onboarding a new hire: register in HR system, set up attendance tracking, and notify the team.

steps.action: Create employee record with personal info, department, and start date
steps.error_hint: Check if employee email already exists in SmartHR. Note: SmartHR is API-only, use REST API at developer.smarthr.jp

steps.action: Register employee for attendance tracking and assign default shift pattern
steps.error_hint: KING OF TIME is API-only. Ensure employee ID format matches SmartHR export

steps.action: Send welcome message to team room and create introduction task
steps.error_hint: Verify bot has permission to post in the target room

gotchas: SmartHR is API-only (no MCP) — employee data contains PII (My Number, address); never log or forward raw payloads to Chatwork messages.
KING OF TIME shift_pattern IDs are opaque integers that vary per tenant; hard-code a lookup or fetch via /shift_patterns before assigning.
Chatwork rate limit is 300 req/5 min and messages are plain text only — no Markdown or rich formatting. Use [info][title]...[/title]...[/info] tags for visual structure.
SmartHR webhook payloads differ between create and update events; always check the event type before mapping fields to KING OF TIME registration.

goal: Invoice creation and accounting sync
description: Create an invoice for a client and sync the transaction to the accounting system.

steps.action: Create invoice with line items, tax calculation, and payment terms
steps.error_hint: Ensure tax rate matches current Japanese consumption tax (10% standard, 8% reduced)

steps.action: Record the receivable entry in the accounting ledger
steps.error_hint: Check fiscal year period is still open before posting

gotchas: freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours. If invoice creation and MoneyForward journaling span separate scheduled runs, both tokens must be refreshed independently.
freee amounts are in JPY (integers, no decimals). MoneyForward journal entry format differs from freee — map the debit/credit structure before posting.
freee requires company_id on every API call. If you manage multiple companies, ensure the invoice is created under the correct company context.
Japanese consumption tax has two rates (10% standard, 8% reduced for food/beverages). Ensure line items use the correct tax_rate or the 適格請求書 will be non-compliant.

goal: Customer follow-up after meeting
description: After a business meeting, look up the contact, send a follow-up message, and create a follow-up task.

steps.action: Look up contact by name or company to get email and meeting history
steps.error_hint: If multiple matches, prefer the most recently scanned business card

steps.action: Send internal follow-up note to the sales team room
steps.error_hint: Keep message under 5000 characters (Chatwork limit)

steps.action: Create a follow-up task with deadline and assign to account owner
steps.error_hint: Ensure assignee has access to the sales project

gotchas: Sansan returns biz card data in batches — contact_id and card_id are different fields, use contact_id for CRM linkage
Chatwork rate limit is 300 requests per 5 minutes — batch follow-up messages to avoid hitting the cap
Backlog issue creation requires project_id and issueType_id which are numeric, not human-readable names

goal: E-commerce order notification to team
description: When a new order comes in, fetch order details and notify the fulfillment team.

steps.action: Get latest order details including items, customer info, and shipping address
steps.error_hint: Order may be in 'pending' status if payment not yet confirmed. BASE is API-only.

steps.action: Send order notification to fulfillment group with item list and shipping info
steps.error_hint: LINE WORKS is API-only. Use Bot API v2. Check bot is added to the fulfillment group.

gotchas: BASE EC API uses OAuth2 with short-lived tokens (30-day access, 60-day refresh). Implement automatic token refresh or the integration will silently stop working after a month.
LINE WORKS Bot API v2 requires the bot to be explicitly added to the target group before it can post. If the bot is removed or the group is recreated, messages will fail with a 403 error.
BASE order status may still be 'pending' when the webhook fires if payment confirmation is delayed. Always verify payment status before notifying fulfillment to avoid premature picking.

goal: Weekly project status report
description: Collect project metrics from the PM tool and share a summary with the team.

steps.action: Get sprint summary: open issues, completed this week, blockers, burndown
steps.error_hint: Ensure milestone/sprint is set correctly for the current iteration

steps.action: Post formatted status report to the project room
steps.error_hint: Use [info] tags for Chatwork rich formatting

gotchas: Backlog sprint/milestone must be correctly configured for the current iteration. If the sprint is misconfigured, the query will return zero issues and the report will be empty without any error.
Chatwork rich formatting uses [info][/info] tags, not Markdown. HTML or Markdown in the message body will render as plain text. Use [info][title]...[/title]...[/info] for structured messages.
Backlog API returns issues in the project's timezone. If your sprint boundaries cross midnight JST, you may get off-by-one-day counting for completed issues.

goal: Contract signing to accounting entry
description: After a contract is signed electronically, record it in the accounting system and notify the team.

steps.action: Get signed contract details (amount, parties, effective date)
steps.error_hint: CloudSign is API-only. Check document status is 'completed' before proceeding.

steps.action: Create sales journal entry with contract amount and revenue recognition date
steps.error_hint: Match revenue recognition to contract effective date, not signing date

steps.action: Post contract closure notification to #sales channel
steps.error_hint: Format amount with Japanese yen symbol and thousands separator

gotchas: CloudSign document lifecycle is strict: draft -> sent -> agreed. Attempting to read contract details before status reaches 'completed' will return incomplete data or error. Always verify document status first.
freee journal entry dates should use the contract effective date, not the signing date. Revenue recognition timing matters for accounting compliance — getting this wrong will cause audit issues.

CloudSign PDF download URLs expire. If there is a delay between CloudSign webhook and freee journal creation, the PDF link for reference attachment may no longer be valid. Download immediately upon completion.
Currency formatting: freee expects amounts as integers (no decimal for JPY). Ensure the CloudSign contract amount is parsed as a clean integer before passing to freee's journal entry API.

goal: E-commerce sales to accounting automation
description: Sync Shopify orders to freee accounting. Auto-create journal entries for each sale with proper consumption tax handling.

steps.action: Get recent orders with line items, tax, shipping, and payment status
steps.error_hint: Filter by financial_status=paid to avoid recording unpaid orders

steps.action: Create journal entries for each order (sales revenue + consumption tax)
steps.error_hint: Apply 8% reduced rate for food items, 10% standard for others. Check インボイス制度 compliance.

steps.action: Post daily sales summary to accounting team room

input_mapping.message: Daily sales: ¥{{total_revenue}}, {{order_count}} orders synced to freee

steps.error_hint: Include order count and any sync errors in the summary

gotchas: Japan's dual consumption tax rates (8% reduced for food, 10% standard) must be applied per line item, not per order. Shopify tax_lines data may not distinguish reduced-rate items automatically — verify product tags or tax codes.

Shopify JP GraphQL Admin API uses cost-based rate limiting, not per-request. A single complex query fetching orders with line items and tax details can consume most of your budget. Use lightweight queries and paginate.
freee journal entries require Invoice System (インボイス制度) compliant format since Oct 2023. Ensure the seller's registration number is included or the tax deduction will be rejected during audit.
Chatwork API rate limit is 5 requests per second. If you batch many orders at end-of-day, throttle the summary post or combine into a single message.

goal: Talent review and evaluation workflow
description: Pull employee data from HR system, review skills and performance, and update talent management platform.

steps.action: Get employee list with department, tenure, and position data
steps.error_hint: SmartHR is API-only. Use v2 endpoint. Filter by active employees only.

steps.action: Update skill matrix and performance evaluation scores
steps.error_hint: Kaonavi is API-only. Use API v2. Match employee IDs between SmartHR and Kaonavi.

steps.action: Create talent review summary page in the HR workspace
steps.error_hint: Ensure Notion integration has access to the HR workspace database

gotchas: SmartHR is API-only; employee list endpoint paginates via cursor — follow the 'next' link in response headers or you will silently miss employees.
Kaonavi API rate limit is strict at 30 req/min. For bulk evaluation updates, use the batch export endpoint and throttle writes.
Employee IDs between SmartHR and Kaonavi are not guaranteed to match. Establish a shared key (e.g., email) in your field mapping before syncing.
Kaonavi evaluation data may contain private performance scores — redact or summarize before posting to Chatwork to avoid PII leaks.

goal: Monthly attendance to payroll processing
description: Collect monthly attendance data, calculate overtime, and sync to payroll system for salary processing.

steps.action: Export monthly attendance summary (work hours, overtime, leave days) for all employees
steps.error_hint: KING OF TIME is API-only. Verify all employees have clocked out before export. Check for unapproved leave requests.

steps.action: Import attendance data into freee payroll and calculate salary
steps.error_hint: Verify overtime calculation matches Japanese labor law: 25% premium for regular overtime, 50% for late night (22:00-5:00)

steps.action: Notify HR manager that payroll is ready for review

input_mapping.message: Payroll for {{target_month}} ready: ¥{{total_payroll}}. Please review and approve.

steps.error_hint: Tag the HR manager directly for approval

gotchas: KING OF TIME is API-only; clock-in/out times may include open records (employees who forgot to clock out). Validate all records are closed before exporting.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours — implement automatic token refresh or the monthly payroll import will fail silently.
Overtime rate calculation must follow Japanese labor law: 25% premium for standard overtime, 50% for late-night (22:00–05:00), 35% for holiday work. Mismatch causes payroll errors.
freee HR requires company_id on every API call. If your org has multiple freee companies, ensure the correct one is selected for the target payroll.

goal: Customer request to development task
description: When a customer request is registered in kintone, automatically create a development task in Backlog and notify the dev team.

steps.action: Get new customer request record with priority, description, and requester info
steps.error_hint: Map kintone priority field values to Backlog priority levels

steps.action: Create issue in the development project with mapped priority and description
steps.error_hint: Include kintone record URL in the Backlog issue description for traceability

steps.action: Notify dev team about new customer request with Backlog issue link
steps.error_hint: Include Backlog issue URL for quick access

gotchas: kintone priority field values are custom dropdown strings (e.g., '高', '中', '低') while Backlog uses numeric priority IDs (2=High, 3=Normal, 4=Low). Build an explicit mapping table — do not rely on string matching.
kintone record URLs are workspace-specific (https://subdomain.cybozu.com/k/appid/show#record=N). Include the full URL in the Backlog issue description for traceability.
Chatwork API rate limit is 5 requests per second. If many customer requests are synced in a batch, queue the notifications to avoid 429 errors.
kintone webhook payload does not include all record fields by default. You may need a follow-up GET request to retrieve the full record details before creating the Backlog issue.

goal: Year-end tax adjustment workflow (年末調整)
description: Collect employee documents, process year-end adjustment calculations, and submit to tax office.

steps.action: Collect employee year-end adjustment documents (扶養控除申告書, 保険料控除申告書)
steps.error_hint: SmartHR is API-only. Send reminder to employees with missing documents before deadline (typically mid-November).

steps.action: Calculate year-end adjustment (withholding tax reconciliation) for each employee
steps.error_hint: Verify housing loan deduction (住宅ローン控除) amounts. First year requires tax office submission, second year onwards through employer.

steps.action: Send year-end adjustment completion report to HR team

input_mapping.message: 年末調整 {{tax_year}} complete. {{employee_count}} processed. Total refund: ¥{{total_refund}}

steps.error_hint: Include count of employees with additional tax due vs refund

gotchas: SmartHR is API-only; year-end adjustment document types (扶養控除申告書, 保険料控除申告書) use specific API endpoints — the generic employee endpoint won't return them.
freee HR fiscal year setting determines which tax year endpoints return data. Verify fiscal_year parameter matches the target 年末調整 year.
Housing loan deduction (住宅ローン控除) requires special handling: first-year submissions go to the tax office directly, not through year-end adjustment.
Chatwork rate limit is 300 req/5 min — if processing hundreds of employees, batch the completion report into a single message rather than per-employee notifications.

goal: Low inventory alert and reorder notification
description: Monitor Shopify inventory levels and alert the purchasing team when stock is low.

steps.action: Check inventory levels for all products, identify items below reorder threshold
steps.error_hint: Check inventory across all locations if multi-warehouse

steps.action: Create reorder request records in the purchasing app
steps.error_hint: Include supplier info and last purchase price from kintone master data

steps.action: Send LINE notification to purchasing manager about low stock items

input_mapping.message: Low stock alert: {{count}} items need reorder

steps.error_hint: Use flex message for rich formatting with product images

gotchas: Shopify multi-location inventory: the GraphQL inventoryLevels query returns stock per location. If you only check one location, you may miss low stock at other warehouses or trigger false alerts.
kintone bulk record creation is capped at 100 records per API call. If many products hit low stock simultaneously (e.g., after a sale event), batch the reorder requests into chunks of 100.

LINE push messages (not reply) cost money per message on your LINE Official Account plan. High-frequency inventory alerts can quickly exhaust your monthly message quota — consider using reply messages or consolidating alerts into a daily digest.
Shopify SKU field is optional and may be empty for some products. Ensure all products have SKUs before relying on SKU as the cross-system identifier for kintone lookups.

goal: kintone status change to Chatwork notification
description: When a record status changes in kintone (e.g., approval, completion), automatically notify the relevant Chatwork room. Most common integration pattern in Japanese companies.

steps.action: Detect record status change and get record details (title, assignee, new status)
steps.error_hint: Use kintone webhook or process management API. Ensure the status field name matches your app's field code.

steps.action: Post status change notification to the project room
steps.error_hint: Use Chatwork [info] tags for visual formatting. Include record URL for one-click access.

gotchas: kintone webhook fires on ALL record updates, not just status changes. Filter for the specific process management status field change to avoid sending notifications on every minor edit.
Chatwork [info] tag formatting is mandatory for structured messages. Plain text messages without [info] tags will appear as a wall of text that is hard to scan.
kintone field codes are workspace-specific and case-sensitive. The status field code in one kintone environment may be different from another — always confirm field codes in the target environment.
Chatwork room IDs are numeric and can be found in the room URL. Hardcoding room IDs is fragile — store them in configuration so they can be updated without code changes.

goal: kintone task assignment to Slack notification
description: When a task is assigned in kintone, send a Slack DM or channel notification to the assignee. Ensures no task goes unnoticed.

steps.action: Get newly assigned task record with assignee, deadline, and priority
steps.error_hint: Map kintone user field to Slack user via email address lookup

steps.action: Send task assignment notification via DM to assignee
steps.error_hint: Use Slack users.lookupByEmail to resolve email to Slack user ID before sending DM

gotchas: Slack users.lookupByEmail API is required to resolve kintone user email to Slack user ID before sending a DM. If the kintone user's email does not match their Slack account email, the lookup will fail silently.
kintone user fields store user codes (login names), not email addresses. You need a separate lookup step to get the email from the user code before calling Slack's lookupByEmail.
Slack DM (conversations.open + chat.postMessage) requires the bot to have im:write and users:read.email scopes. Missing scopes will return a 'missing_scope' error.
kintone date format is YYYY-MM-DD but Slack message formatting expects human-readable dates. Convert deadline dates to a user-friendly format (e.g., 'April 15, 2026') for better readability.

goal: kintone client master to freee accounting sync
description: When a new client is registered in kintone CRM, automatically create the corresponding trading partner in freee. Eliminates double-entry between sales and accounting.

steps.action: Get new client record (company name, address, contact person, payment terms)
steps.error_hint: Only sync clients with status 'approved' to avoid creating incomplete records in freee

steps.action: Create trading partner (取引先) in freee with matched payment terms
steps.error_hint: Check for existing partner with same name to avoid duplicates. Map kintone payment terms to freee's payment term codes.

steps.action: Update the client record with the freee partner ID for future reference
steps.error_hint: Add a 'freee連携済み' status flag to prevent duplicate syncs

gotchas: freee trading partner (取引先) names must be unique. If a client with the same name already exists, the API will return an error. Always search for duplicates before creating a new partner.
kintone payment terms (e.g., '月末締め翌月末払い') are free-text strings while freee expects specific payment term codes. Build a lookup table mapping kintone terms to freee's enum values.
Syncing back the freee partner_id to kintone (step 3) can trigger the kintone webhook again, creating a potential infinite loop. Use a 'freee連携済み' flag and check it before processing.
freee API requires a company_id scope in the OAuth token. If the token belongs to a different company, all API calls will silently create records in the wrong company.

goal: kintone daily attendance data from KING OF TIME
description: Import daily attendance data from KING OF TIME into a kintone app for managers to review alongside project data. Common pattern for companies using kintone as operations hub.

steps.action: Get daily attendance records (clock-in/out, overtime, breaks) for all employees
steps.error_hint: KING OF TIME is API-only. Check for employees who forgot to clock out (open records).

steps.action: Upsert attendance records into the daily attendance kintone app
steps.error_hint: Use bulk update API for efficiency. Match on employee_id + date as unique key.

steps.action: Alert HR about attendance anomalies (missing clock-out, excessive overtime)

input_mapping.message: Attendance alert: {{anomaly_count}} issues detected today. Check kintone app.

steps.error_hint: Only send notification if anomalies exist. Include direct link to kintone filtered view.

gotchas: KING OF TIME is API-only; check for open records (employees who forgot to clock out) before importing — incomplete records will cause data integrity issues in kintone.
kintone field codes are workspace-specific and change between environments. Externalize the attendance app field code mapping in config, not in code.
kintone does not support native upsert. Query by employee_id + date composite key first, then add or update to avoid duplicate attendance rows.
Chatwork rate limit is 300 req/5 min. Send anomaly alerts only when issues exist, and batch all anomalies into a single message rather than per-employee notifications.

goal: SmartHR new hire data to kintone onboarding app
description: When a new employee is registered in SmartHR, automatically create onboarding task records in kintone with checklist items (PC setup, account creation, orientation schedule).

steps.action: Get new employee details (name, department, start date, position)
steps.error_hint: SmartHR is API-only. Filter by employment status '入社予定' (scheduled to join).

steps.action: Create onboarding checklist record from template with department-specific tasks
steps.error_hint: Use kintone app template records for department-specific checklists (IT setup varies by department)

steps.action: Notify department manager and IT team about upcoming new hire

input_mapping.message: New hire: {{employee_name}} joining {{department}} on {{start_date}}. Onboarding checklist: {{checklist_url}}

steps.error_hint: Tag the department manager and #it-support for PC preparation

gotchas: SmartHR is API-only and webhook payloads differ between create/update — filter by employment status '入社予定' to avoid processing existing employee updates.
kintone field codes are workspace-specific; the onboarding app field codes in staging will differ from production. Externalize field code mapping in config.
kintone lookup fields cannot be set directly via API — if your checklist template uses lookups, set the source field value instead and let kintone resolve the lookup.
Slack channel names max 80 characters, must be lowercase with no spaces or Japanese characters. Sanitize employee name to romaji before creating the channel.

goal: kintone customer data to HubSpot CRM sync
description: Sync customer contact information from kintone to HubSpot for marketing automation. Enables sales data in kintone to feed into HubSpot email sequences and deal tracking.

steps.action: Get recently updated customer records with contact details and deal stage
steps.error_hint: Use kintone's updated_time query to get only changed records since last sync

steps.action: Upsert contacts in HubSpot with mapped properties (company, deal stage, source)
steps.error_hint: Use HubSpot batch API for efficiency. Map kintone field codes to HubSpot property names in config.

steps.action: Post sync summary to sales ops room

input_mapping.message: CRM Sync: {{synced_count}} contacts synced kintone→HubSpot. Errors: {{error_count}}

steps.error_hint: Only notify if errors > 0, otherwise use daily summary

gotchas: kintone field codes are workspace-specific — hardcode the actual field codes, not display names
HubSpot contact properties are case-sensitive — 'Email' and 'email' are different fields
HubSpot rate limit is 100 requests per 10 seconds — batch kintone record reads to stay under the cap
kintone record numbers are auto-generated — never try to set them when creating records in HubSpot-to-kintone direction

goal: Stripe payment to freee automatic journal entry
description: When a Stripe payment succeeds, automatically create an income journal entry in freee. Common pattern for SaaS companies and online businesses in Japan.

steps.action: Get successful payment details (amount, customer, description, fees)
steps.error_hint: Convert Stripe amount from cents to yen (JPY is zero-decimal currency, no conversion needed). Include Stripe fee as separate expense line.

steps.action: Create compound journal entry: revenue + Stripe fee expense + net receivable
steps.error_hint: Record Stripe processing fee (3.6%) as 支払手数料. Net amount = payment - fee.

steps.action: Post payment notification to #revenue channel
steps.error_hint: Format with ¥ and thousands separator for readability

gotchas: Stripe JP amounts for JPY are already in whole yen (amount=1000 means ¥1000, NOT ¥10). Do not divide by 100 — this is the most common integration bug.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours and company_id is required on every call. Implement auto-refresh and validate company_id before posting journals.
Record Stripe processing fee (typically 3.6% for domestic cards) as 支払手数料 in a separate expense line. Net amount = payment amount minus fee.
Stripe test keys (sk_test_*) and live keys (sk_live_*) hit different environments. Verify you are using live keys in production to avoid missing real payments.

goal: Shopify order to Yamato shipping label
description: When a Shopify order is placed, automatically create a Yamato B2 Cloud shipping label and update the order with tracking number. Essential for Japanese e-commerce operations.

steps.action: Get new unfulfilled orders with shipping address details
steps.error_hint: Japanese addresses: use address1 for 都道府県+市区町村, address2 for 番地+建物名. zip format: 123-4567

steps.action: Create shipping label with recipient address and package details
steps.error_hint: ヤマト B2: delivery time slots are Japanese standard: 午前中/14-16/16-18/18-20/19-21. Specify お届け希望時間帯.

steps.action: Update order with tracking number and mark as fulfilled
steps.error_hint: Shopify automatically sends tracking email to customer on fulfillment

gotchas: Yamato B2 Cloud API uses SOAP/XML, not REST JSON. Your HTTP client must send properly formatted XML with Shift-JIS encoding — UTF-8 requests will be rejected with a cryptic encoding error.
Japanese address parsing from Shopify is tricky: address1/address2 splitting varies by customer input. Yamato requires 都道府県 (prefecture) as a separate field. Parse and validate before submission.
Shopify webhook HMAC verification is essential — unverified webhooks could inject fake orders. Always validate the X-Shopify-Hmac-SHA256 header before creating shipping labels.
Yamato tracking numbers follow a specific 12-digit format. When writing back to Shopify fulfillment, use carrier name 'Yamato Transport' (ヤマト運輸) to enable automatic tracking URL generation.

goal: Zendesk support ticket escalation to HubSpot deal
description: When a Zendesk ticket reveals an upsell opportunity (e.g., customer asks about features on higher plan), create a deal in HubSpot and notify the account owner.

steps.action: Get ticket details with customer info and conversation history
steps.error_hint: Zendesk requester may not have organization set — fall back to email domain for company identification

steps.action: Find or create contact, then create deal in upsell pipeline
steps.error_hint: Use HubSpot search API to find existing contact by email before creating a new one (avoid duplicates)

steps.action: Notify account owner about upsell opportunity with ticket context
steps.error_hint: Tag the deal owner with @mention using their Slack user ID

gotchas: Zendesk uses cursor-based pagination (not offset) — follow the next_page URL, don't manually increment page numbers
Zendesk ticket comments include both public replies and internal notes — filter by 'public: true' before syncing to HubSpot
HubSpot association API is separate from contact/deal APIs — creating a ticket-contact link requires a second API call
Zendesk rate limit varies by plan (Team: 200/min, Pro: 400/min) — check your plan before setting batch sizes

goal: Square POS daily sales to freee journal entry
description: At end of day, aggregate Square POS sales and create a daily revenue journal entry in freee. Common pattern for retail shops and restaurants in Japan.

steps.action: Get today's payment transactions aggregated by payment method
steps.error_hint: Square amounts are in JPY (integer). Separate cash vs card vs QR (PayPay, etc.) for accurate accounting

steps.action: Create compound journal entry with split by payment method
steps.error_hint: Card payments: debit 売掛金 (accounts receivable). Cash: debit 現金. QR payments (PayPay etc.): debit 売掛金 with sub-account.

steps.action: Post daily sales summary to store management room

input_mapping.message:
[info][title]本日の売上[/title]合計: ¥{{total_sales}} ({{transaction_count}}件)
現金: ¥{{cash}} / カード: ¥{{card}} / QR: ¥{{qr}}[/info]

steps.error_hint: Use Chatwork [info] tags for formatted summary. Include comparison with yesterday if available.

gotchas: Square amounts are in JPY (integers). freee also expects JPY integers — no currency conversion needed, but verify both sides agree on tax-inclusive vs tax-exclusive totals.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours and company_id is required. Refresh before the daily journal post or the entire day's sales will fail to record.
Split journal entries by payment method: cash → 現金 (debit), card/QR → 売掛金 (debit), total → 売上高 (credit). Missing this split makes bank reconciliation impossible.
Chatwork rate limit is 300 req/5 min and supports plain text only. Use [info] tags for the daily summary, and format ¥ amounts with comma separators for readability.

goal: RESERVA booking to LINE notification
description: When a new reservation is made on RESERVA, send a confirmation message to the customer via LINE and notify staff via Chatwork. Common for clinics, salons, and fitness studios.

steps.action: Get new booking details (customer, date/time, service, staff)
steps.error_hint: RESERVA webhook or polling. Customer LINE ID must be linked in advance via RESERVA's LINE連携 feature.

steps.action: Send booking confirmation Flex Message to customer
steps.error_hint: Use Flex Message for rich confirmation card (date, time, service, cancel link). Reply messages are free; push messages count against quota.

steps.action: Notify staff room about new booking
steps.error_hint: Tag the assigned staff member with [To:account_id]. Include direct link to RESERVA admin for easy management.

gotchas: RESERVA customer LINE ID linkage must be set up in advance via RESERVA's LINE連携 feature. Without this linkage, the LINE user ID will be null and the push message will fail.

LINE push messages are NOT free — each push message counts against your LINE Official Account monthly message quota. For high-volume clinics/salons, this can become expensive. Consider using the LINE reply message (free) when possible.
RESERVA's webhook/API support varies by plan tier. Free and lower-tier plans may only support polling, adding latency between booking and notification.
Chatwork [To:account_id] mention tag requires the numeric account_id, not the account name. Maintain a mapping of staff names to Chatwork account IDs for proper @mentions.

goal: kintone deal close to SMS thank-you via Twilio
description: When a deal is closed-won in kintone, send a personalized thank-you SMS to the customer via Twilio and log the activity. Japanese business courtesy automation.

steps.action: Get closed-won deal details with customer phone number
steps.error_hint: Japanese phone numbers: mobile starts with 070/080/090. Format as +81XXXXXXXXX (drop leading 0).

steps.action: Send personalized thank-you SMS

input_mapping.body: {{customer_name}}様、この度はご契約ありがとうございます。今後ともよろしくお願いいたします。

steps.error_hint: Twilio JP: use +81 format. Japanese SMS has 670 char limit (Shift_JIS). Keep under 70 chars for single segment.

steps.action: Update deal record with SMS sent timestamp
steps.error_hint: Mark as sent to prevent duplicate SMS. Use kintone's revision field for optimistic concurrency.

gotchas: Japanese mobile numbers must be converted from domestic format (090-XXXX-XXXX) to E.164 format (+81XXXXXXXXX, dropping the leading 0) before passing to Twilio. Incorrect format will cause delivery failure.
Japanese SMS has a 670-character limit (Shift-JIS), but messages over 70 characters are split into multiple segments, each billed separately. Keep thank-you messages concise to control costs.

kintone record revision checking is essential to prevent duplicate SMS sends. Use the revision field for optimistic concurrency — if another process updated the record between your read and write, retry.
Twilio JP phone numbers for SMS have specific requirements. Not all Twilio number types support SMS in Japan — verify your Twilio number has SMS capability enabled for the JP region.

goal: CloudSign signed contract to Box archive
description: When a contract is signed in CloudSign, download the signed PDF and archive it in the correct Box folder organized by client and year. Automated contract management.

steps.action: Get newly signed contract document with PDF
steps.error_hint: CloudSign returns signed PDF via /documents/{id}/files. Download within 30 days of signing.

CloudSign callback/webhook URLs must use HTTPS. Box shared links should have expiry dates set per your company's document retention policy — indefinite links are a security risk.

gotchas: CloudSign document status transitions are strict: draft → sent → agreed. You cannot skip steps or move backwards. Send only after confirming the draft is complete.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours. If invoice creation and CloudSign envelope happen in separate sessions, refresh the freee token before updating invoice status.
CloudSign free plan limits to 5 documents per month. Check remaining quota via API before creating the envelope to avoid a hard failure.
Ensure freee invoice uses 適格請求書 (qualified invoice) format for Invoice System compliance. Missing registration number will make the e-signed document non-compliant.

gotchas: SmartHR is API-only and the payroll endpoint requires the 'payroll' OAuth scope. Verify the OAuth token has this scope or the export will return 403.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours and requires company_id on every call. Refresh token and confirm company_id before creating journal entries.
SmartHR deduction categories (法定福利費, 給与手当) must be mapped to freee account codes. If target accounts don't exist in freee's chart of accounts, journal creation will fail.
Payroll data is highly sensitive PII. The Slack notification should only include employee count and totals — never individual salary amounts or names.

freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours and company_id is required. Salesforce process builder may trigger at any time — ensure token refresh is automated, not manual.

The custom field 'freee_invoice_id__c' must be pre-created in the Salesforce schema. The API will silently ignore writes to non-existent custom fields.

Tableau data-driven alerts trigger based on threshold values. The dashboard view must be refreshed (extract refresh completed) before the alert evaluates — stale data will not trigger alerts even if thresholds are breached.
Slack file upload (for dashboard image) requires files:write scope AND the bot must be in the target channel. The image upload is a separate API call from the message post — both must succeed.
Tableau trusted authentication requires IP whitelisting of your integration server. If your server IP changes (e.g., cloud deployment), the auth will break with no useful error message.

Looker Look results are returned as JSON with string-typed numbers. kintone number fields require numeric types — cast string values to numbers before creating kintone records or you will get type validation errors.

Looker query results may include null values for periods with no data. kintone number fields do not accept null — convert null values to 0 or skip those fields to prevent record creation failures.

HENNGE One access control policies are complex and layered (IP-based, device-based, geo-based). The alert payload may include policy violation codes that need to be translated into human-readable descriptions for the Slack message.
HENNGE One webhook configuration is done in the Access Control admin settings, not the general API settings. This is a common setup miss — look under the 'Audit Log' or 'Notification' section.

Security alerts must be acted on quickly. Set the Slack channel notification level to 'Every new message' and consider adding @channel mentions for critical severity events to ensure immediate visibility.

kintone API token permissions are per-app and do not inherit. The token for the user directory app must explicitly have record add, edit, and view permissions — missing any one will cause partial failures.
Posting to multiple Slack channels (general + IT) sequentially can hit Slack's rate limit (1 message per second per channel). Add a small delay between posts.

kintone API connection in Zapier requires the full subdomain format (subdomain.cybozu.com). A common misconfiguration is omitting .cybozu.com, which causes all kintone steps to fail.

goal: Manage PAY.JP subscriptions in kintone
description: Track PAY.JP subscription lifecycle events (created, renewed, cancelled) in a kintone app for customer success management.

steps.action: Receive subscription event webhook (created, renewed, cancelled, failed)
steps.error_hint: PAY.JP webhook events may be delivered out of order. Use event timestamp for ordering

steps.action: Update subscription record status in customer management app
steps.error_hint: Use kintone query API to find existing record before update. Create if not found

gotchas: PAY.JP webhook events can arrive out of order (e.g., 'renewed' before 'created' if there is a delivery delay). Always check the event timestamp and use idempotency logic when updating kintone records.
kintone does not have native upsert. You must query for existing records by subscription_id first, then decide whether to create or update. This requires two API calls per event.
PAY.JP test mode and live mode use different API keys and generate separate webhook events. Ensure your kintone app has a flag to distinguish test vs. production subscription records.
PAY.JP subscription failure events (payment_failed) need special handling — update kintone status but also trigger a follow-up action (e.g., customer notification) rather than just logging.

goal: Sync SmartHR employee master to freee HR
description: Keep employee data in sync between SmartHR (as master) and freee HR for integrated payroll processing.

steps.action: Export updated employee records since last sync timestamp
steps.error_hint: SmartHR API pagination uses cursor-based approach. Follow 'next' link in response headers

steps.action: Upsert employee records with mapped fields from SmartHR
steps.error_hint: freee HR employee number format may differ from SmartHR. Use email as secondary match key

steps.action: Report sync results to HR operations room
steps.error_hint: Include error employee names for quick troubleshooting

gotchas: SmartHR is API-only with cursor-based pagination — always follow the 'next' link in response headers or you will miss employees beyond the first page.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours. Schedule syncs to refresh the token first, or the upsert step will return 401.
Employee number formats differ between SmartHR and freee HR. Use email as a secondary match key to avoid creating duplicates when IDs don't align.
SmartHR employee data is PII-heavy — the Chatwork sync report should only include counts and error summaries, never names or personal details.

goal: Alert Slack when Jobcan detects attendance anomalies
description: Monitor Jobcan attendance data for late arrivals, forgotten clock-outs, and overtime alerts, then notify managers via Slack.

steps.action: Check daily attendance records for anomalies (late, missing clock-out, overtime threshold)
steps.error_hint: Jobcan API uses Basic Auth with API key. Rate limit is 100 requests per minute

steps.action: Send anomaly summary to department manager's channel
steps.error_hint: Map Jobcan department IDs to Slack channel IDs in configuration. Keep mapping updated

gotchas: Jobcan is API-only with Basic Auth using an API key. Rate limit is 100 req/min — if polling multiple departments, stagger requests to avoid 429 errors.
Jobcan department IDs are numeric and do not match Slack channel IDs. Maintain a department-to-channel mapping in config and keep it updated when org changes occur.
Attendance anomaly definitions (late, missing clock-out, overtime threshold) must be configured in your logic — Jobcan API returns raw records, not pre-classified anomalies.
Slack bot must be invited to each target channel before posting. Use conversations.join or manually invite the bot to all manager channels during setup.

goal: Post KING OF TIME overtime data to freee as accrual entries
description: Calculate monthly overtime costs from KING OF TIME and create accrual journal entries in freee before payroll finalization.

steps.action: Export monthly overtime hours by employee with overtime type classification
steps.error_hint: KING OF TIME classifies overtime into 法定内 and 法定外. Rates differ (1.25x vs 1.35x for 60+ hours)

steps.action: Create overtime accrual journal entry with proper account allocation
steps.error_hint: Reverse previous month's accrual before posting new one to avoid double-counting

gotchas: KING OF TIME is API-only; overtime classification distinguishes 法定内 (statutory within) and 法定外 (statutory excess) with different multiplier rates (1.25x vs 1.35x for 60+ hours/month).
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours and company_id is required on every call. Refresh the token and validate company_id before posting journal entries.
Always reverse the previous month's overtime accrual entry before posting the new one to avoid double-counting in freee's ledger.
KING OF TIME returns overtime hours in decimal format (2.5 = 2h30m). Convert to yen amounts using configured hourly rates before creating the freee journal entry.

goal: Sync social insurance procedures between OfficeStation and SmartHR
description: When employee status changes in SmartHR, automatically prepare social insurance forms in OfficeStation for e-Gov submission.

steps.action: Detect employee status change (hire, termination, address change, dependent change)
steps.error_hint: SmartHR webhook may fire before all related fields are updated. Add 5-second delay before fetching details

steps.action: Create appropriate social insurance form (取得届/喪失届/変更届) with employee data
steps.error_hint: OfficeStation form fields must match e-Gov format exactly. My Number handling requires encryption

steps.action: Notify HR team that insurance form is ready for review and submission
steps.error_hint: Never include My Number or sensitive data in notification messages

gotchas: SmartHR webhooks may fire before all related fields are updated. Add a short delay (5+ seconds) before fetching employee details to ensure data consistency.
OfficeStation form fields must match e-Gov format exactly — My Number (マイナンバー) handling requires encryption in transit and must never appear in Chatwork notifications.
SmartHR webhook payloads differ between create and update events. Map change_type to the correct OfficeStation form type (取得届 for hire, 喪失届 for termination, 変更届 for changes).
Chatwork rate limit is 300 req/5 min and only supports plain text. Never include employee PII (My Number, insurance numbers) in notification messages.

goal: Notify Slack of new Talentio interview schedules
description: When interviews are scheduled in Talentio ATS, notify interviewers via Slack and create calendar events.

steps.action: Detect new interview scheduled event with candidate and interviewer details
steps.error_hint: Talentio API is invite-only. Contact Talentio support to enable API access for your account

steps.action: Create calendar event for all interviewers with candidate details
steps.error_hint: Google Calendar API requires calendar write scope. Check service account domain-wide delegation

steps.action: DM each interviewer with interview preparation notes
steps.error_hint: Slack users.lookupByEmail may fail if interviewer uses different email. Maintain email mapping

gotchas: Talentio API is invite-only — you must contact Talentio support to enable API access before this recipe can work. There is no self-service API key generation.
Slack users.lookupByEmail may fail if interviewers use different email addresses in Slack vs Talentio. Maintain an explicit email mapping table.
Google Calendar API requires the calendar write scope and service account domain-wide delegation must be configured for the calendar to create events on behalf of users.
Candidate names and interview details are sensitive recruiting data. Avoid posting candidate full names in public Slack channels — use DMs to interviewers only.

goal: Sync talent management data between Kaonavi and SmartHR
description: Keep employee evaluation data in Kaonavi synchronized with SmartHR employee master for unified people analytics.

steps.action: Export employee evaluation scores, competency data, and career preferences
steps.error_hint: Kaonavi API rate limit is strict (30 req/min). Use bulk export endpoint for large datasets

steps.action: Update employee custom fields with evaluation summary and talent flag
steps.error_hint: SmartHR custom field groups must be created in advance. Check field group ID is correct

gotchas: Kaonavi API rate limit is strict at 30 req/min. Use the bulk export endpoint for large evaluation datasets instead of per-employee calls.
SmartHR custom field groups must be pre-created in the SmartHR admin console. The API will return 422 if the target field group ID does not exist.
Employee ID formats differ between Kaonavi and SmartHR. Establish a shared unique key (email or employee number) in your mapping configuration.
Evaluation data contains sensitive performance information classified as PII under Japanese privacy law. Ensure API calls use HTTPS and never cache scores in plain text.

goal: Sync leave balances between freee HR and Jobcan
description: Synchronize paid leave (有給休暇) balances from freee HR to Jobcan attendance system for accurate leave tracking.

steps.action: Export current paid leave balances for all active employees
steps.error_hint: freee HR leave API returns balances as of the query date. Check for pending leave requests not yet reflected

steps.action: Update leave balance records for each employee
steps.error_hint: Jobcan leave types must be mapped to freee HR leave categories. 有休 vs 特別休暇 distinction matters

gotchas: freee HR leave balance API returns balances as of the query date but does not reflect pending/unapproved leave requests. Warn users about potential discrepancies.
Jobcan leave types (有休, 特別休暇, 代休, etc.) must be manually mapped to freee HR leave categories. Mismatched types will silently fail or overwrite wrong balances.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours. If this sync runs on a daily schedule, implement token refresh at the start of each run.
Jobcan is API-only with a rate limit of 100 req/min. For organizations with 100+ employees, batch the balance updates to stay under the limit.

goal: Sync SmartHR employee data to Garoon address book
description: Keep Garoon (Cybozu) corporate address book updated with SmartHR employee master data including department and contact info.

steps.action: Export employee directory with department, position, and contact details
steps.error_hint: SmartHR may include inactive employees. Filter by employment_status = 'employed'

steps.action: Update address book entries with employee data, creating new entries as needed
steps.error_hint: Garoon address book API requires cybozu.com admin privileges. Use XML API for older Garoon versions

gotchas: SmartHR is API-only; the employee list may include inactive/terminated employees. Filter by employment_status = 'employed' before syncing to Garoon.
Garoon address book API requires cybozu.com admin privileges. For on-premises Garoon versions, the XML-based API must be used instead of the REST API.
SmartHR employee data is PII-heavy (phone, address, email). Only sync fields that belong in a corporate directory — omit salary, My Number, and personal details.
Garoon does not support upsert natively. Query existing entries by employee ID first, then decide whether to create or update to avoid duplicate directory entries.

goal: Enrich Salesforce contacts with Sansan business card data
description: Match Salesforce contacts with Sansan scanned business cards to add latest title, department, and phone information.

steps.action: Search for business cards matching Salesforce contact email or name
steps.error_hint: Sansan API search is fuzzy. May return multiple matches for common Japanese names. Use company as secondary filter

steps.action: Update contact fields with latest business card information
steps.error_hint: Salesforce field-level security may prevent updates. Check profile permissions for target fields

gotchas: Sansan rate limit is strict: 100 requests per minute — batch Salesforce contact lookups before hitting Sansan
Sansan contact_id and card_id are separate — use contact_id for person-level data, card_id for specific business card images
Salesforce contact update requires the record ID — look up by email first, handle duplicates (Salesforce may have multiple contacts per email)
Sansan returns Japanese company names in full-width characters — normalize before matching with Salesforce Account names

goal: Auto-create Notion deal pages from Salesforce opportunities
description: When a Salesforce opportunity reaches 'Proposal' stage, create a Notion page with deal template for collaborative deal planning.

steps.action: Retrieve opportunity details and related contacts when stage reaches Proposal
steps.error_hint: Salesforce Process Builder or Flow is needed to fire webhook. Check Flow version is active

steps.action: Create deal page from template in deals database with opportunity data
steps.error_hint: Notion API has 3 requests/second rate limit. Notion page properties must match database schema exactly

steps.action: Store Notion page URL in Salesforce opportunity custom field
steps.error_hint: Custom URL field in Salesforce has 255 char limit. Notion URLs are typically under 100 chars

gotchas: Notion API requires database_id for database operations — page_id is different. Use search API to find the right database
Salesforce Opportunity field values may contain special characters that break Notion rich text — sanitize before insertion
Notion property names must exactly match the database schema — 'Deal Name' != 'deal_name'. Check casing and spaces
Notion rate limit is 3 requests per second — queue Salesforce deal updates if batch processing

goal: Record LINE Pay settlements in freee accounting
description: When LINE Pay settles merchant payments, create journal entries in freee separating sales revenue from payment fees.

steps.action: Retrieve settlement report with transaction breakdown and fees
steps.error_hint: LINE Pay settlement API requires Payment API key, not Channel API key. Check key type

steps.action: Create journal entry for settlement: debit bank, credit sales, debit payment fees
steps.error_hint: LINE Pay fees include tax. Ensure fee journal entry separates fee amount and consumption tax

gotchas: LINE Pay settlement API requires a Payment API key, not the Channel API key used for messaging. Using the wrong key returns a confusing authentication error.
LINE Pay fees include consumption tax. The freee journal entry must separate the fee base amount and its tax component, or tax reporting will be inaccurate.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours and company_id is required on every call. Refresh before processing each settlement batch.
LINE Pay settlements aggregate multiple transactions. Map settlement_id to individual transaction IDs if you need per-transaction reconciliation in freee.

goal: Record Paidy BNPL transactions in MoneyForward
description: Sync Paidy buy-now-pay-later payment captures to MoneyForward as receivable entries with settlement schedule tracking.

steps.action: Receive payment capture webhook with order and settlement details
steps.error_hint: Paidy webhook requires HMAC-SHA256 signature verification. Store secret key securely

steps.action: Create receivable entry with expected settlement date
steps.error_hint: Paidy settlement is typically 2 business days after month-end. Set receivable due date accordingly

gotchas: Paidy webhook requires HMAC-SHA256 signature verification. Store the secret key securely (env var, not in code) and validate every incoming payload.
Paidy settlement timing is typically 2 business days after month-end. Set the receivable due date in MoneyForward to the actual settlement date, not the purchase date.
MoneyForward OAuth token management mirrors freee — token refresh is required. Implement auto-refresh or scheduled BNPL recording will fail on expired tokens.
Paidy captures may be partial. Always use the capture amount from the webhook payload, not the original order amount, for the MoneyForward receivable entry.

goal: Manage CloudSign contract lifecycle in kintone
description: Track CloudSign document status changes in a kintone contract management app with automatic status updates and alerts.

steps.action: Receive document status change webhook (sent, viewed, signed, completed)
steps.error_hint: CloudSign webhook requires IP whitelist configuration. Add your server IP in CloudSign admin

steps.action: Update contract record status and add timestamp for current stage
steps.error_hint: Create kintone record when document is first sent, then update on subsequent status changes

steps.action: Notify legal team of contract completion or stalled signatures
steps.error_hint: Only notify on key status changes (completed, expired) to avoid notification fatigue

gotchas: CloudSign webhook requires IP whitelist configuration in the CloudSign admin panel. If your server IP changes (e.g., serverless deployment), webhooks will silently stop arriving.

CloudSign document status transitions are strict (draft -> sent -> viewed -> signed -> completed). Your kintone status field must map to these exact states, and status can only move forward — never backward.

kintone webhook fires on ALL record updates. When you update the contract record in step 2, this triggers another webhook. Implement a guard (e.g., check if the update source is CloudSign) to prevent infinite loops.
CloudSign free plan limits you to 5 documents per month. Track your quota in kintone and alert before hitting the limit to avoid blocked contract sends.

goal: Update Salesforce opportunity when DocuSign contract is signed
description: When a DocuSign envelope is completed, automatically update the related Salesforce opportunity to Closed Won and store the signed document.

steps.action: Receive envelope completed webhook with signed document
steps.error_hint: DocuSign Connect webhook must be configured at account level. Ensure envelope custom fields contain Salesforce opportunity ID

steps.action: Update opportunity stage to Closed Won and attach signed contract as file
steps.error_hint: Salesforce ContentVersion API is used for file attachment. Check file size limit (2GB for API)

gotchas: DocuSign demo (demo.docusign.net) and production (docusign.net) use completely different base URLs and API keys. Envelope IDs from demo do not exist in production — never mix environments.

DocuSign Connect (webhook) must be configured at the account level, and envelope custom fields must contain the Salesforce opportunity ID for the mapping to work. Without this, you cannot link the signed doc back to the right deal.
DocuSign JWT auth requires an RSA private key and consent grant. The RSA key must be generated and uploaded to DocuSign — using a self-signed cert from another service will fail.
Salesforce ContentVersion API (for file attachment) has different size limits depending on your org edition. Enterprise supports up to 2GB via API, but check your specific org's file storage quota.

goal: Archive GMO Sign completed contracts in Box
description: When a GMO Sign contract is fully executed, automatically download and archive it in Box with structured metadata.

steps.action: Detect contract completion and download signed PDF with audit trail
steps.error_hint: GMO Sign API documentation is primarily in Japanese. Use agree.gmosign.com API endpoint

steps.action: Upload signed contract to designated folder with metadata template
steps.error_hint: Box metadata templates must be created in advance. Use enterprise scope for shared templates

gotchas: GMO Sign API documentation is primarily in Japanese and hosted at agree.gmosign.com. English-language agent tools may struggle to parse the API reference — provide explicit endpoint URLs in your config.
Box metadata templates must be pre-created with the enterprise scope before you can attach metadata to uploaded contracts. Template creation requires Box admin privileges.
GMO Sign webhook payloads include the signed PDF as a download URL, not inline content. Download the PDF first, then upload to Box — do not attempt to pass the URL directly to Box upload.
Box JWT auth requires a Box application with server authentication enabled and admin authorization. The setup involves generating a keypair, configuring the app, and having a Box admin approve it.

goal: Trigger freee Sign contract from kintone approval
description: When a kintone contract request record is approved, automatically create and send the contract via freee Sign for e-signature.

steps.action: Detect approval status change on contract request app record
steps.error_hint: kintone webhook fires on all record updates. Filter for process management status change specifically

steps.action: Create contract document from template and send to counterparty for signature
steps.error_hint: freee Sign template field names must exactly match. Verify field mapping before automating

steps.action: Update contract request record with freee Sign document ID and sent timestamp
steps.error_hint: Avoid infinite webhook loops: check if update trigger field is different from the status change field

gotchas: kintone webhook fires on ALL record updates, not just approval status changes. When step 3 updates the record with the freee Sign document ID, it will trigger another webhook. Guard against infinite loops by checking which field changed.

freee Sign template field placeholder names must match exactly (case-sensitive) with the data you pass. A single mismatched field name will cause the document to generate with blank fields — test with draft mode first.

kintone process management (approval workflow) status values are workspace-specific strings, not standardized codes. Confirm the exact status value (e.g., '承認済み') in your kintone app before coding the filter.
freee Sign is a newer service with evolving API. Check for API version changes and deprecation notices regularly — endpoints may change with less notice than established e-sign providers.

goal: Sync Shopify online and Smaregi POS inventory in real-time
description: Keep inventory counts synchronized between Shopify (online) and Smaregi (physical store) to prevent overselling.

steps.action: Receive inventory level update webhook when online order reduces stock
steps.error_hint: Shopify inventory webhooks may fire multiple times. Use idempotency key for deduplication

steps.action: Update corresponding product stock count in Smaregi POS
steps.error_hint: Smaregi product code must match Shopify SKU exactly. Standardize SKU format across both systems

gotchas: Shopify inventory webhooks can fire multiple times for the same event (at-least-once delivery). Without idempotency checks, you will double-decrement Smaregi stock and cause phantom stockouts.
SKU format must be identical across Shopify and Smaregi. Common mismatch: Smaregi may use a numeric product code while Shopify uses alphanumeric SKU. Standardize before going live.
Race condition risk: if an in-store sale and an online sale happen simultaneously, both systems may read stale inventory. Implement a locking mechanism or queue to serialize updates.
Smaregi API rate limits are strict for the standard plan. During high-traffic periods (e.g., sales events), inventory sync may lag behind actual orders.

goal: Record BASE EC orders in freee as sales transactions
description: Sync completed BASE online store orders to freee as sales journal entries with proper tax categorization.

steps.action: Retrieve new completed orders with item details and payment method
steps.error_hint: BASE API uses OAuth2. Access token expires in 30 days, refresh token in 60 days. Implement auto-refresh

steps.action: Create sales deals for each order with item-level tax rate classification
steps.error_hint: BASE includes shipping fee in order total. Separate shipping revenue account in freee (発送手数料)

gotchas: BASE API uses OAuth2 with a 30-day access token and 60-day refresh token. Implement auto-refresh well before expiry — if the refresh token expires, re-authorization requires manual user intervention.
BASE includes shipping fees in the order total. Separate shipping into its own freee account (発送手数料) or shipping revenue will be incorrectly classified as product sales.
freee OAuth token expires every 24 hours and company_id is required. Both BASE and freee tokens must be valid simultaneously for the sync to work.
Japanese consumption tax has two rates (10% standard, 8% reduced for food). BASE order items may mix rates — ensure each freee line item carries the correct tax_rate classification.

goal: Generate Yamato B2 shipping labels from EC-CUBE orders
description: Export new EC-CUBE orders and generate Yamato Transport B2 shipping labels automatically for fulfillment.

steps.action: Export new orders pending shipment with recipient address details
steps.error_hint: EC-CUBE API varies by version (3.x vs 4.x). Confirm API endpoint format matches your version

steps.action: Register shipments and generate shipping labels with tracking numbers
steps.error_hint: Yamato B2 CSV format is strict: use Shift-JIS encoding and specific column order. UTF-8 will cause errors

steps.action: Update order status to shipped and store tracking numbers
steps.error_hint: Send shipping notification email after updating tracking. Check EC-CUBE mail template settings

gotchas: EC-CUBE API endpoints differ significantly between v3.x and v4.x. Confirm your EC-CUBE version before building — v3 uses a custom REST API while v4 supports a more standard format.
Yamato B2 CSV import requires Shift-JIS encoding with specific column ordering. Sending UTF-8 encoded data will produce garbled Japanese characters (文字化け) and rejected shipments.
EC-CUBE stores Japanese addresses in a structured format but Yamato requires specific field separation (prefecture, city, street). Map EC-CUBE's addr01/addr02 fields to Yamato's format carefully.

After updating tracking numbers in EC-CUBE, the shipping notification email template must be configured in EC-CUBE's mail settings. Missing template = no customer notification despite successful label creation.

goal: Generate Japan Post shipping data from Color Me Shop orders
description: Export Color Me Shop orders and register with Japan Post for shipping label generation.

steps.action: Retrieve new unshipped orders with delivery address details
steps.error_hint: Color Me API uses OAuth2. Token refresh endpoint differs from standard OAuth flow

steps.action: Register shipments and generate tracking numbers via ClickPost or WebLetter API
steps.error_hint: Japan Post API accepts only Japanese addresses in specific format. Ensure 都道府県 is separated

gotchas: Color Me Shop API uses a non-standard OAuth2 flow — the token refresh endpoint URL differs from the standard spec. Store the refresh URL from the initial auth response, do not hardcode the standard path.
Japan Post API (via ClickPost or direct) requires addresses strictly formatted with 都道府県 separated from the rest. Color Me orders may store the full address in a single field — you must parse it.
Japan Post tracking number format varies by service type (Yu-Pack, Yu-Mail, etc.). Ensure you request the correct service type based on package weight and dimensions.
Color Me Shop webhook support is limited. You may need to poll the orders API on a schedule instead of relying on real-time webhooks, which adds latency to shipping label generation.

goal: Update Shopify fulfillment from Logiless warehouse shipping
description: When Logiless WMS marks an order as shipped, update the Shopify order fulfillment status with tracking information.

steps.action: Receive shipment completion notification with tracking details
steps.error_hint: Logiless webhook payload uses internal order ID. Map to Shopify order number via reference field

steps.action: Create fulfillment on Shopify order with tracking number and carrier
steps.error_hint: Shopify Fulfillment API v2024-01+ requires fulfillment order ID, not just order ID. Migrate to new API

gotchas: Logiless webhook payload uses its internal order ID, not the Shopify order number. You must maintain a mapping table (or use a reference field) to resolve Logiless order ID to Shopify order ID.
Shopify Fulfillment API changed significantly in 2024-01: you now need the fulfillment_order_id (not just order_id) to create a fulfillment. Ensure you are using the current API version.

Logiless may split a single order into multiple shipments (partial fulfillment). Your integration must handle creating multiple Shopify fulfillments for one order without marking the order fully fulfilled prematurely.
Carrier name mapping: Logiless uses Japanese carrier names (e.g., 'ヤマト運輸', '佐川急便') while Shopify expects specific carrier strings for tracking URL generation. Maintain a carrier name translation map.

goal: Create Backlog issues from Slack bug reports
description: Allow team members to create Backlog bug tickets directly from Slack using a slash command or reaction.

steps.action: Capture bug report via slash command or bug emoji reaction with message content
steps.error_hint: Slack Events API requires URL verification challenge response. Implement /slack/events endpoint

steps.action: Create bug issue with priority, description, and Slack thread link
steps.error_hint: Backlog API uses API key or OAuth2. API key is simpler but tied to a single user. Use OAuth2 for team

steps.action: Reply in thread with Backlog issue link and assigned developer
steps.error_hint: Thread reply requires both channel and thread_ts. Ensure original message ts is captured

gotchas: Slack Events API requires a URL verification challenge-response during setup. Your endpoint must respond to the challenge before it can receive any events — this is a one-time setup step that is easy to forget.
Backlog issue type 'Bug' must exist in the target project. Backlog projects do not have this type by default — create it in Backlog project settings before the integration will work.
Slack thread_ts is required for replying in-thread. If the original message is not in a thread, use the message's ts as thread_ts to start a new thread from that message.
Backlog API key authentication ties all actions to a single user. For team use, prefer OAuth2 so the issue creator is correctly attributed in Backlog.

goal: Bridge kintone project records to Asana tasks
description: When a kintone project management record is created, automatically create a corresponding Asana task with subtasks for the cross-team workflow.

steps.action: Detect new project record creation with task breakdown
steps.error_hint: kintone webhook payload does not include subtable data. Fetch full record via API after webhook trigger

steps.action: Create task in project with subtasks and deadline
steps.error_hint: Asana API returns task GID as string. Store as text field in kintone, not number

steps.action: Store Asana task link back in kintone record
steps.error_hint: Use kintone record update API with revision check to prevent concurrent edit conflicts

gotchas: kintone webhook payload does NOT include subtable (テーブル) data. After receiving the webhook, you must make a separate GET request to fetch the full record including subtask table rows.
Asana task GID is returned as a string, not a number. Storing it in a kintone number field will cause data loss or errors — use a single-line text field in kintone.
Writing the Asana task URL back to kintone (step 3) will trigger another kintone webhook. Implement loop detection by checking if the asana_url field is already populated before processing.
Asana API rate limits are 1,500 requests per minute. Creating a task with many subtasks in rapid succession can hit the limit — add a small delay between subtask creation calls.

goal: Alert Slack on Google Analytics traffic anomalies
description: Monitor Google Analytics for unusual traffic spikes or drops and alert the marketing team in Slack.

steps.action: Compare current hour's sessions against rolling average to detect anomalies
steps.error_hint: GA4 Data API has quota of 10,000 requests per day per project. Cache results to minimize API calls

steps.action: Post traffic anomaly alert with comparison chart data
steps.error_hint: Only alert if anomaly exceeds threshold to avoid alert fatigue. Default threshold: 50% deviation

gotchas: GA4 Data API uses 'properties/PROPERTY_ID' format — not the old UA-XXXXX tracking ID
GA4 API quota: 10 requests per minute per property for free tier — schedule alerts, don't poll frequently
Slack message formatting: use mrkdwn (not markdown) — *bold* works but **bold** doesn't
GA4 date ranges use YYYY-MM-DD format — relative dates like 'today' or 'yesterday' are also supported but may cause timezone issues

goal: Sync Treasure Data segments to Looker for visualization
description: Export Treasure Data audience segments and make them available in Looker dashboards for business intelligence reporting.

steps.action: Run scheduled query to export audience segment data
steps.error_hint: Treasure Data query may take minutes for large datasets. Use Presto for faster interactive queries, Hive for batch

steps.action: Trigger PDT (Persistent Derived Table) rebuild to refresh segment data
steps.error_hint: Looker PDT rebuild can be slow. Use datagroups for smart caching instead of forced rebuild

steps.action: Notify analytics team that segment data has been refreshed

input_mapping.message: Segment data refreshed: {{row_count}} records updated in Looker

steps.error_hint: Include Looker dashboard link in notification for quick access

gotchas: Treasure Data queries can take minutes for large segment datasets. Use Presto engine for interactive (faster) queries and Hive for batch jobs. Choosing wrong engine can mean 10x difference in execution time.

Looker PDT (Persistent Derived Table) rebuilds are asynchronous and can take significant time. Do not assume the data is immediately available after triggering the rebuild — poll for completion status.
Treasure Data export format must match the database schema that Looker's LookML model expects. Column name or type mismatches will cause the PDT rebuild to fail silently with stale data.
Looker API uses datagroups for cache management. Trigger the correct datagroup invalidation instead of forcing a full PDT rebuild — this is more efficient and avoids unnecessary database load.

goal: Embed Tableau dashboard data in kintone records
description: Pull key metrics from Tableau views and populate kintone dashboard app for users without Tableau licenses.

steps.action: Query view data via REST API for specified dashboard metrics
steps.error_hint: Tableau REST API returns data in pages of 10,000 rows. Implement pagination for large views

steps.action: Update or create dashboard summary records with latest metrics
steps.error_hint: kintone graph/chart features can visualize the data. Configure app views for visual display

gotchas: Tableau REST API requires site-id in every request URL. The site-id is different from the site name — use the Tableau REST API to query the correct site-id before making data requests.
Tableau view data pagination returns max 10,000 rows per page. If your dashboard view has more rows, implement pagination or the kintone app will have incomplete data.
kintone graph/chart views can visualize imported Tableau data, but kintone chart types are limited compared to Tableau. Complex Tableau visualizations will lose fidelity when represented in kintone.

Metabase session token expiry (14 days default) combined with monthly scheduling means the token will expire between runs. Implement session creation as part of each scheduled execution.

goal: Store HENNGE One access logs in kintone for compliance

kintone bulk add API is limited to 100 records per request. HENNGE One can generate thousands of access log entries per day — implement chunked uploads with proper error handling for each batch.
HENNGE One log timestamps are in UTC. kintone date/time fields default to JST (UTC+9). Convert timezones during import or your compliance audit timeline will be off by 9 hours.

Department-to-policy mapping (config.department_policy_map) must be kept in sync with both Auth0 role definitions and HENNGE One access policies. A mapping mismatch means new users get wrong access levels — a security risk.

Google Drive storage quota applies per workspace. High-volume Slack channels sharing many files can quickly fill up Drive storage — set up quota monitoring alerts.
Slack files shared via external URL (e.g., links to Figma, Google Docs) are not actual file uploads and will not trigger the file_shared event. Only directly uploaded files are captured.

Make's kintone module requires the subdomain WITHOUT .cybozu.com (just 'mycompany', not 'mycompany.cybozu.com'). This is the opposite of Zapier's convention — a common misconfiguration source.
HubSpot deal properties may include custom properties that do not exist in kintone. Map only the fields you need and handle unmapped properties gracefully to avoid Make scenario errors.

Slack channel names must be lowercase, max 80 characters, no spaces or periods — dynamically generated names like 'incident-2026-04-10-payment-service' can exceed limits or contain invalid characters. Sanitize and truncate before creating.
Slack's conversations.create API requires the channels:manage scope, which is separate from chat:write — the bot can post messages but not create channels unless this additional scope is granted.
Datadog monitors can flap between OK and ALERT rapidly — add a recovery threshold or evaluation window to prevent creating multiple incident channels for the same issue within minutes.

The guest's LINE user ID must be collected during the TableCheck reservation flow. If the guest booked via phone or walk-in, there will be no LINE ID available — implement a fallback (SMS or email).
LINE push message delivery is not guaranteed if the user has blocked your official account or if the user ID is invalid. Check the LINE API response for error codes and handle gracefully.

Slack conversations.invite requires the bot to already be a member of the channel. Call conversations.join first, then invite HR team, manager, and buddy.

Shopify fires order webhooks on ANY update, not just status changes. Filter specifically for fulfillment_status transitions to avoid sending duplicate or irrelevant notifications to customers.

kintone does not support native upsert. Query existing records by freee invoice_id first, then add or update to avoid duplicate rows in the dashboard app.

Discord bot tokens require the MESSAGE_CONTENT privileged intent only for reading messages; sending to a channel requires the bot to have Send Messages permission AND be present in the server — a missing guild membership returns a 403 that looks like a permissions error.

GitHub push webhooks for monorepos fire on every push regardless of path — if you only want main-branch production deploys, filter on ref === 'refs/heads/main' in your handler or you will trigger deploys from feature branches.

goal: Automatically triage production errors with AI analysis

steps.error_hint: Ensure the Linear API key has write access to the target team

steps.action: Analyze stack trace to suggest root cause and potential fix
steps.error_hint: Keep prompt under 4000 tokens. If stack trace is long, truncate to last 50 frames.

steps.action: Post triage summary with AI analysis and Linear issue link
steps.error_hint: Use Slack Block Kit for better formatting if message exceeds 3000 characters

gotchas: Sentry webhook payloads for issue events can be very large (>100KB with full stack traces) — if your handler has a body size limit (common in serverless), the webhook silently fails. Increase the limit or use Sentry's internal integration which sends compact payloads.

OpenAI's gpt-4o has a 128K context window but charges per token — sending full stack traces with 200+ frames is expensive and often unnecessary. Truncate to the top 50 frames and include only the exception chain.

Sentry groups similar errors into issues — a single webhook may represent hundreds of events. Check the issue frequency/count before creating a Linear task to avoid flooding the backlog with low-occurrence errors.

Linear priority field accepts integers (0=none, 1=urgent, 2=high, 3=medium, 4=low), not strings — passing Sentry's frequency as a string will cause the mutation to fail. Map frequency ranges to integer priorities explicitly.

Linear labels are identified by name within a team scope, but the API requires the label UUID — query the team's labels first to resolve 'code-review' to its ID, or issue creation will fail silently with a null label.

GitHub's secondary rate limit on the Search API is 30 requests/minute — if this recipe runs alongside other GitHub automations, the webhook diff-stats fetch can get throttled and return a 403 with a Retry-After header.
